productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Printed Pink Dress
description: Composition White and pink printed strappy dress with yellow trims made of cotton fabric, has a bow at the chest, lace detail at the midriff, a flaring skirt, lace belt at the back, inner skirt with yellow trims and a ruffled hemline Comes with a matching elastic hairband Fit Regular Wash care Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Do not iron on emebellishments Use warm iron Remove all detatchable accessories before washing or ironing Gini and Jony have come up with this pretty dress, perfect for your little princess. Designed for both style and comfort, dress her up and watch her steal the show everywhere she goes!
